/usr/lib64/ccache/bin/g++  -fPIC -D_LANGUAGE_C_PLUS_PLUS  -O0 -g -D_DEBUG -DTARG_MIPS -shared -Wl,-soname,whirl2f.so -o ../../../lib/mips/whirl2f.so CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/init2f.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/__/whirl2c/diagnostics.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/__/whirl2c/PUinfo.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/__/whirl2c/stab_attr.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/__/whirl2c/token_buffer.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/__/whirl2c/w2cf_parentize.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/__/whirl2c/w2cf_symtab.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/__/whirl2c/wn_attr.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/st2f.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/tcon2f.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/ty2f.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/whirl2f_common.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/wn2f.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/wn2f_expr.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/wn2f_io.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/wn2f_load_store.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/wn2f_stmt.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/wn2f_pragma.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/w2f_driver.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2f-mips.dir/init.cxx.o ../../../lib/mips/libcomutil.a ../../../lib/mips/be.so ../../../lib/mips/libcomutil.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarginfo.a -lm -ldl -Wl,-rpath,/home/jhj/compiler/build/lib/mips:
